title: 🔄 Non-Wellfounded Sets (Circular Logic Sets)
name: Non-Wellfounded Sets (Circular Logic Sets)
what_it_is: A logic system where sets can contain themselves—used to model paradox, recursion, self-reference, and circular metaphysics.
how_to_use: she is a non-wellfounded entity—self-contained and self-defining, looped into herself
his crown is a recursion loop—each jewel referencing the whole system in closed paradox
animation_behavior: Visual forms that feed into themselves, endlessly self-nesting, infinite identity feedback ---
